strengths: Clear problem framing: truth maintenance in long-horizon agent memory
Well-defined method: claim schema, linker, and truth-consistent retrieval
Strong empirical claim: +40pp on temporal reasoning, -58% tokens
Ablation study isolates contribution of truth-maintenance edges
weaknesses: Results rely on placeholder macros; no actual data or evaluation details
No statistical significance or error bars reported
Overall accuracy lower than baseline; trade-off not fully justified
Limited discussion of failure modes or limitations

Provide actual algorithm pseudocode for the maximum-consistent subgraph, not just a description
